$comment: Expected findings emitted by the pipeline on this fixture. Prose fields (summary, why, fix) are regex patterns; everything else is exact match. The runner uses lib/schema.py to verify every finding also validates against finding-format.schema.json.

findings.$why_decide_prefix: Real secret leaks aren't a mechanical fix — they need rotation at the provider, possibly history rewrite, and a secret-manager destination. fix-applier never auto-applies these; the orchestrator must escalate.

findings.$why_aggregate_acceptable: The diff introduced 4-space indentation in a presumably-2-space project plus a stray trailing blank line. A formatter would catch both. We accept either P1 (changed lines have format errors) or P2 (default for hygiene). We accept biome as a substitute for prettier if the reviewer detected a different formatter — the schema's tool field doesn't constrain which.

$count_tolerance_note: We accept 2-4 findings. The minimum is the two planted smells. Up to two extra findings tolerated (e.g. the reviewer noticed the apiVersion is also indented differently than the baseline — that's a real observation, not noise). More than 4 = the reviewer is hallucinating; CI should investigate.
